modules.name: 微速引擎 V3.0 (极简终极版)
modules.code:
(function(){ const SPEED_CONFIG={multiplier:1.0,accumulator:0.0}; const SPEED_TIERS=[1.0,1.05,1.10,1.15,1.20,1.25,1.30,1.40,1.50,1.75,2.0,3.0,4.0,5.0]; function getSmoothOffset(mult){if(mult>=5.0)return 14;if(mult>=4.0)return 16;if(mult>=3.0)return 18;if(mult>=2.0)return 20;return 25} (function createSpeedPanel(){ if(document.getElementById('ghost-speed-panel-v3'))document.getElementById('ghost-speed-panel-v3').remove(); const panel=document.createElement('div'); panel.id='ghost-speed-panel-v3'; panel.style.cssText='position: fixed; top: 50%; left: 5px; transform: translateY(-50%); background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); padding: 5px; border-radius: 4px; z-index: 999999; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; user-select: none; border: 1px solid #444; cursor: move;'; const header=document.createElement('div'); header.id='speed-header'; header.innerHTML='
⚡
'; header.style.cssText='cursor: pointer;'; panel.appendChild(header); const btnContainer=document.createElement('div'); btnContainer.id='speed-btns'; btnContainer.style.cssText='display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px;'; panel.appendChild(btnContainer); SPEED_TIERS.forEach((tier)=>{ const btn=document.createElement('button'); btn.innerText=tier.toFixed(2); btn.style.cssText='background: transparent; color: #aaa; border: 1px solid transparent; padding: 2px 4px; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; outline: none; font-family: monospace; font-size: 10px; text-align: center; transition: all 0.1s;'; btn.onclick=function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); SPEED_CONFIG.multiplier=tier; SPEED_CONFIG.accumulator=0.0; Array.from(btnContainer.children).forEach(b=>{ b.style.background='transparent'; b.style.color='#aaa'; b.style.borderColor='transparent'; b.style.fontWeight='normal' }); btn.style.background='rgba(230,57,70,0.8)'; btn.style.color='#fff'; btn.style.borderColor='#ff7b00'; btn.style.fontWeight='bold'; let ct=document.getElementById('speed-collapsed-tier'); if(ct)ct.innerText=tier.toFixed(2)+'x' }; btnContainer.appendChild(btn) }); let collapsedDiv=document.createElement('div'); collapsedDiv.id='speed-collapsed'; collapsedDiv.style.cssText='display: none; align-items: center; gap: 4px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap;'; collapsedDiv.innerHTML='⚡1.00x'; panel.appendChild(collapsedDiv); document.body.appendChild(panel); btnContainer.children[0].click(); let isCollapsed=false; header.addEventListener('click',function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); isCollapsed=true; btnContainer.style.display='none'; header.style.display='none'; collapsedDiv.style.display='flex'; panel.style.padding='4px 6px' }); collapsedDiv.addEventListener('click',function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); isCollapsed=false; btnContainer.style.display='flex'; header.style.display='block'; collapsedDiv.style.display='none'; panel.style.padding='5px' }); let isDragging=false; let dragOffsetX=0; let dragOffsetY=0; let hasMoved=false; panel.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){ if(e.target.tagName==='BUTTON')return; isDragging=true; hasMoved=false; let rect=panel.getBoundingClientRect(); dragOffsetX=e.clientX-rect.left; dragOffsetY=e.clientY-rect.top; e.preventDefault() }); document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){ if(!isDragging)return; hasMoved=true; let newX=e.clientX-dragOffsetX; let newY=e.clientY-dragOffsetY; newX=Math.max(0,Math.min(newX,window.innerWidth-50)); newY=Math.max(0,Math.min(newY,window.innerHeight-30)); panel.style.left=newX+'px'; panel.style.top=newY+'px'; panel.style.transform='none' }); document.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){ isDragging=false }); panel.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){ if(e.keyCode===32||e.keyCode===13||e.keyCode>=37&&e.keyCode<=40){ e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation() } },true); panel.addEventListener('keyup',function(e){ if(e.keyCode===32||e.keyCode===13||e.keyCode>=37&&e.keyCode<=40){ e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation() } },true) })(); if(!window._ghostOriginalPomeloNotify){window._ghostOriginalPomeloNotify=window.pomelo.notify} window.pomelo.notify=function(route,msg){ if(route==="area.playerHandler.sendAction"&&msg&&msg.input){ if(msg.input.type===1){ if(SPEED_CONFIG.multiplier<=1.0){SPEED_CONFIG.accumulator=0;return window._ghostOriginalPomeloNotify.apply(this,arguments)} SPEED_CONFIG.accumulator+=(SPEED_CONFIG.multiplier-1.0); if(SPEED_CONFIG.accumulator>=1.0){ let baseFrameId=msg.frameId; let baseTs=msg.input.ts||Date.now(); let extraPackets=Math.floor(SPEED_CONFIG.accumulator); let currentOffset=getSmoothOffset(SPEED_CONFIG.multiplier); for(let i=1;i<=extraPackets;i++){ let fakePacket=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(msg)); fakePacket.frameId=baseFrameId+(i-1); fakePacket.input.ts=baseTs-(extraPackets-i+1)*currentOffset; window._ghostOriginalPomeloNotify.call(this,route,fakePacket) } msg.frameId=baseFrameId+extraPackets; msg.input.ts=baseTs; SPEED_CONFIG.accumulator-=extraPackets } } } return window._ghostOriginalPomeloNotify.apply(this,arguments) }; if(window._ghostKeyHandler)document.removeEventListener('keydown',window._ghostKeyHandler); window._ghostKeyHandler=function(e){ if(!e.isTrusted||e.target.tagName==='INPUT'||e.target.tagName==='TEXTAREA')return; if(e.keyCode===187||e.keyCode===107||e.keyCode===189||e.keyCode===109){ let currentTier=SPEED_CONFIG.multiplier; let index=SPEED_TIERS.findIndex(t=>Math.abs(t-currentTier)<0.01); if(index===-1)index=0; if(e.keyCode===187||e.keyCode===107){ if(index0){ const btnContainer=document.getElementById('speed-btns'); if(btnContainer)btnContainer.children[index-1].click() } } } }; document.addEventListener('keydown',window._ghostKeyHandler); console.clear(); console.log("%c✔️ [微速引擎 V3.1 可拖动折叠版] 注入成功！\n👉 点击⚡图标可折叠/展开面板，面板可自由拖动。\n👉 战斗中按键盘 『 + 』 / 『 - 』 键调节节奏！","color: #00BFFF; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold;") })();
